channel.title: wifi on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in wifi on IT notes

item.title: MTU 1453
item.description: If after upgrading macOS to 10.13.4 wifi stop working give a try to change the MTU:

item.title: Raspberry Pi 1 Model B
item.description: Raspberry Pi 1 Model B, FreeBSD + wifi cat /var/run/dmesg.boot: KDB: debugger backends: ddb KDB: current backend: ddb Copyright (c) 1992-2016 The FreeBSD Project.
